About Me

Ahmad Raza.
Founder, Millionax.

I'm a performance marketing specialist from Multan, Pakistan — serving US local businesses. I have 3+ years of hands-on experience running Google Ads, building GoHighLevel automation, and executing SEO across 100+ projects.

I graduated with a BS in IT from BZU Multan (2024) and combined that technical foundation with deep marketing expertise. I work with HVAC, dental, real estate, and restaurants — I understand the exact problems each industry faces.

Millionax is built on one belief: every dollar you spend on ads should come back multiplied. In 30 days.
